Memory management, helper functions, initialization, property lookup, literal storage, built-in objects, prototypes, and operations for ECMA in JerryScript.

## Folders
- **[base](base/README.md)**: Memory management, helper functions, initialization, property lookup, and literal storage for ECMA in JerryScript.
- **[builtin-objects](builtin-objects/README.md)**: ECMA built-in objects and prototypes for JerryScript, including arrays, booleans, dates, errors, functions, globals, JSON, math, numbers, objects, regexps, strings, and various error types.
- **[operations](operations/README.md)**: Operations for ECMA objects, arrays, booleans, numbers, strings, functions, comparisons, conversions, exceptions, lexical environments, references, regular expressions, and try-catch macros in JerryScript.
